title: elymus africanus
intro: Elymus africanus, also known as African wheat grass or Pennisetum thomense, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elymus africanus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements, and has also been used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
